incidents.title: payment-api returning 500 errors
incidents.description: Payment API is returning HTTP 500 errors. Multiple customers reporting failed transactions. Monitoring shows error rate spiked from 0.1% to 34% at 08:42 UTC.

incidents.title: internal-dashboard disk usage at 92%
incidents.description: Disk usage on internal-dashboard app server reached 92%. Threshold alert fired. Service still operational but approaching capacity.

incidents.title: notification-service delivery delays
incidents.description: Email and SMS notifications are delayed by 15-30 minutes. Queue depth increasing. Started approximately 08:50 UTC.

incidents.title: fraud-check latency spike
incidents.description: Fraud check API response times spiked to 8 seconds (normally 200ms). Affecting transaction approval pipeline.

incidents.title: marketing-site 404 errors on /pricing
incidents.description: The /pricing page on the marketing site is returning 404. Likely a deployment issue. No customer-facing transactions affected.

incidents.title: payment-api degraded response times
incidents.description: Payment API response times elevated to 3-5 seconds (normally 150ms). Not a full outage but significantly impacting checkout flow. Existing INC-5010 was opened 2 hours ago for the same service.
